title: Realistic Civilization Experiment Modpack
description: The official modpack for use in the Realistic Minecraft Civilization Experiment.
body: This modpack is for use in Sinjin's Realistic Minecraft Civilization Experiment, however you are free to use it as you'd like! Some major changes are Tempature and thirst, tons more food, furnature, boats, more entities, and a ton of quality of life and performance mods. There's also built in Complementary shaders for you to use if you'd like.
